mapper.insert:
/* AMI장치 등록 */ INSERT INTO tb_device_ami ( site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarmMsg, voltage_r, voltage_s, voltage_t, current_r, current_s, current_t, frequency, accum_actv_pwr_r, accum_actv_pwr_s, accum_actv_pwr_t, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_r, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_s, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_t, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_r, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_s, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_t, std_date, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{entity.siteId}, #{entity.deviceId}, #{entity.deviceName}, #{entity.deviceStat}, #{entity.alarmMsg}, #{entity.voltageR}, #{entity.voltageS}, #{entity.voltageT}, #{entity.currentR}, #{entity.currentS}, #{entity.currentT}, #{entity.frequency}, #{entity.accumActvPwrR}, #{entity.accumActvPwrS}, #{entity.accumActvPwrT}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingR}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingS}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingT}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingR}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingS}, #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingT}, #{entity.stdDate}, NOW())
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
mapper.update:
/* AMI장치 수정 */ UPDATE tb_device_ami
site_id = #{entity.siteId},
device_id = #{entity.deviceId},
device_name = #{entity.deviceName},
device_stat = #{entity.deviceStat},
alarm_msg = #{entity.alarmMsg},
voltage_r = #{entity.voltageR},
voltage_s = #{entity.voltageS},
voltage_t = #{entity.voltageT},
current_r = #{entity.currentR},
current_s = #{entity.currentS},
current_t = #{entity.currentT},
frequency = #{entity.frequency},
accum_actv_pwr_r = #{entity.accumActvPwrR},
accum_actv_pwr_s = #{entity.accumActvPwrS},
accum_actv_pwr_t = #{entity.accumActvPwrT},
accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_r = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingR},
accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_s = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingS},
accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_t = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLaggingT},
accum_rctv_pwr_leading_r = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingR},
accum_rctv_pwr_leading_s = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingS},
accum_rctv_pwr_leading_t = #{entity.accumRctvPwrLeadingT},
std_date = #{entity.stdDate},
reg_date = #{entity.regDate},
WHERE device_ami_idx = #{entity.deviceAmiIdx}
mapper.select: /* AMI장치 상세조회 */ SELECT device_ami_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, voltage_r, voltage_s, voltage_t, current_r, current_s, current_t, frequency, accum_actv_pwr_r, accum_actv_pwr_s, accum_actv_pwr_t, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_r, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_s, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_t, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_r, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_s, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_t, std_date, reg_date FROM tb_device_ami WHERE device_ami_idx = #{deviceAmiIdx}

/* AMI장치 목록조회 */ SELECT device_ami_idx, site_id, device_id, device_name, device_stat, alarm_msg, voltage_r, voltage_s, voltage_t, current_r, current_s, current_t, frequency, accum_actv_pwr_r, accum_actv_pwr_s, accum_actv_pwr_t, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_r, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_s, accum_rctv_pwr_lagging_t, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_r, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_s, accum_rctv_pwr_leading_t, std_date, reg_date FROM tb_device_ami
WHERE LIMIT #{pageable.start}, #{pageable.end}
